content:
As stated by the title, want to check with the devs if there's any possibility of a doresain kit rework to make him more satisfying to use. 

Current state of doresain is fine, though is considered to be on the weaker side, he can still clear A5 content in Dtide sometimes

However his kit does feel quite "painful" to play, many players that pulled doresain Overexalt regreted doing so.

most frequent mention pain point in the community are as follows:

1. Exalt targeting: in multi-target boss fights, doresain usually have trouble landing exalt on the boss, because it always target the enemy with the least hp. I believe the intent is to clear the mobs with evernight revel or other AOE first before exalt, but its usually not that easy to do so in end game content, especially since evernight is only created after an exalt or on kill, and even then it doesn't do enough damage unless you hoard it( which is a major waste of hand space, not to mention doresain crit rate buff on devour is for exalt only, and revel is not protected from arithmetic harmony).
And against some bosses like doll, it is actually impossible to do a good run with doresain.


2. Exalt damage wastage: doresain might be the awaker with the most amount of wasted damage in the game, aside from the targeting issue, with how his enlighten works, he will do more damage to a lower health target. sounds good on paper, but it also makes battle against high hp/multi hp bar boss a huge struggle.

Players are trapped in this weird loop of:

To do damage I need the enemy to be at low health -> to get enemy to low health i need to do damage -> to do damage I need the enemy to be at low health.

This makes doresain really good at clearing low end content, but struggle very hard in end game content.


Although I don't think he really need a buff, but perhaps small QoL changes like damage overflow or kit changes to make him more suited towards either single target or AOE would make him more fun and satisfying to play
